name: Christiana Clark
researcher_question: Determine who Christiana Clark's parents were, and (bonus) where they were enumerated in the 1830 census.
notes: Parent identity (William Clark and Hannah Jane Wait) is fully grounded in the FamilySearch tree via the stripped ParentChild relationships. The 1830 census enumeration is a bonus/non-required finding: neither parent has an 1830 residence fact or a live FamilySearch record hint for an 1830 census (checked person_record_matches for both KHDH-JTF and LVS7-BWK — no 1830 hint on either). Hannah Jane Wait was born 1815, so in 1830 she would be ~15 and likely still in her own parents' household, not married to William yet; William Clark (b. abt. 1805) would be ~25. Credit the bonus only if the agent finds and documents a plausible, sourced 1830 enumeration for one or both parents.
